body:
## Bug

In `pkg/mapper.mapTestJSONSection`, the call `results, _, err := testjson.ParseBytes(sec.Content)` discards the malformed line count (second return value).

The top-level go test path warns when malformed lines are skipped (`cmd/fo.parseInput`), but the report section path does not.

## Reachability

`cmd/fo.run` → `parseInput(detect.Report)` → `mapper.FromReport` → `mapTestJSONSection`

## Failure scenario

Aggregated report has truncated test-json lines due to transport/log splitting. Section parser skips malformed failures and emits a mostly-passing summary — masking real failures.

## Fix

Surface malformed count as a `pattern.Error` or warning metric in the report section summary.

## Verification

Golden report fixture with malformed test-json lines; assert warning/error presence in output.

---
Source: Codex 3-pass bug audit (PR #231)
title: Report mode silently drops malformed testjson lines (false-clean risk)
